---
description: "Start the new feature flow: the Product Owner agent clarifies the demand, defines acceptance criteria, and creates a GitHub Issue."
agent: "product-owner"
---

A new feature request has been received. Follow the Product Owner workflow:

1. Clarify the demand — ask questions if anything is ambiguous or incomplete
2. Search existing GitHub Issues to avoid duplicates
3. Define the task with business context, scope, and acceptance criteria (Given/When/Then)
4. Assign priority (P0–P3) with justification
5. Create a GitHub Issue via MCP with full structure including subtask checklist
6. Post the structured output with demand summary, task card, acceptance criteria, and priority

Always consult project documentation under `/docs` before creating the issue.
